title: Deep Fried Malaysian Chicken Satay
description: A fatty and gooey Malaysian dish featuring chicken satay deep fried to perfection, served with a brandy infused peanut-free sauce, perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together coconut milk, brandy, garlic, ginger, salt, and black pepper to make the marinade.
Add the chicken strips to the marinade and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes.
Heat the vegetable oil in a deep frying pan to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
Remove the chicken from the marinade and deep fry until golden brown and cooked through.
Using a slotted spoon, remove the chicken from the oil and place on a paper towel lined plate to drain excess oil.
Serve the deep fried chicken satay hot with your favorite dipping sauce.
Garnish with sliced onions and cilantro for added flavor and texture.
Repeat the frying process in batches if necessary to prevent overcrowding the pan.
